source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Display serif-inspired headings with clean sans UI text and Noto Sans JP or Hiragino guidance for Japanese labels.
layout: Large 16:9 canvas boards, 8px product radii, wing-window panels, charcoal vein dividers, generous spacing, warm shadows, and precise dashboard density.

prompts.label: Transparent Atlas moth motif
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Atlas Moth transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only an isolated Atlas moth motif for a design-system catalog, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: A complete Atlas moth (Attacus atlas) with accurate broad triangular wings, copper brown and warm chestnut wing fields, cream translucent window markings, black vein structure, charcoal outlines, and the distinctive snake-head-like wing tips. Natural wing-scale texture, symmetrical but organic posture, crisp silhouette edges, visible body and antennae.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; show both forewings and hindwings without cropping.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves copper brown, cream, black, and subtle tropical forest undertones.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #00ff00 anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no butterfly, no monarch, no dragonfly, no extra insects, no flowers, no leaves, no branch, no landscape, no decorative background, no text, no watermark.

prompts.label: Light design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Create one 3840x2160 comprehensive light-mode design-system board for Morphous Atlas Moth / Atlas Moth Wing, derived from the Atlas moth motif.
Reference use: Extract palette, texture rhythm, contrast, spacing mood, and interaction language from the Atlas moth image: copper brown wings, cream translucent windows, charcoal black outlines, warm chestnut, tawny gold, pale parchment, and tropical forest undertones.
Required visible sections: title, motif story, palette, typography, Japanese typography, components, navigation, dashboard/data/charts, forms, table, command/search, status states, texture, radius, spacing, shadow, tokens, sample usage, generated asset examples.
Visual language: large canvas system, 8px radius cards, wing-window panels, black vein dividers, cream window surfaces, copper active states, tawny focus rings, subtle wing-scale texture, snake-tip corner motif, tropical forest accent used sparingly.
Constraints: no monarch butterfly, no dragonfly, no unrelated bright colors, no generic purple/blue gradients, no random brand names, no watermark, no tiny illegible paragraphs, no misspelled system name.

prompts.label: Dark design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Create one 3840x2160 comprehensive dark-mode board for Morphous Atlas Moth / Atlas Moth Wing. It must feel like the same system translated to dark mode, not a new theme.
Reference use: Preserve motif-derived palette roles, component language, texture, spacing, typography, wing-window panels, black vein dividers, cream windows, copper active states, tawny focus rings, and snake-tip corner motifs.
Required visible sections: title, Dark Mode, motif story, palette, typography, Japanese typography, components, navigation, dashboard/data/charts, forms, table, command/search, status states, texture, radius, spacing, shadow, tokens, sample usage, generated asset examples.
Visual language: large canvas dark system, 8px radius cards, deep moth-shadow background, warm cream foreground, charcoal and burnt umber surfaces, copper active states, tawny gold focus rings, forest underside accents used sparingly, subtle wing-scale texture overlays.
Constraints: no monarch butterfly, no dragonfly, no neon colors, no unrelated bright colors, no generic purple/blue gradients, no random brand names, no watermark, no tiny illegible paragraphs, no misspelled system name.
